summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.workflow; import java.io.*; import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets; import java.nio.file.*; import java.util.List; import java.util.zip.ZipEntry; import java.util.zip.ZipOutputStream; public class MediatedExportManager { public File createExportPackage(String sessionId, String prompt, List<String> selectedPaths, File projectRoot, String outputPath) throws IOException { String fileName = "mediated_export_" + sessionId + "_" + System.currentTimeMillis() + ".zip"; File targetDir = projectRoot; if (outputPath != null && !outputPath.isEmpty()) { targetDir = new File(outputPath); if (!targetDir.exists()) { targetDir.mkdirs(); } } File zipFile = new File(targetDir, fileName); try (ZipOutputStream zos = new ZipOutputStream(new FileOutputStream(zipFile))) { addStringToZip(zos, "PROMPT.md", prompt);
